name: T-Kun strikes again!
description:
Bear with me, this is my first ever character created and because of lack of imagination or maybe because of the Truck-Kun manhwa that I was reading, which filled my thoughts... there is no better name! 😅

Fantasy world with magic, battles, money, intrigue, loot, crafting, bartering etc and status panel, we can't have that missing.

Oh... and Alignments, so you better be careful how you act or you'll always see how evil you are in the status panel 😈

And remember, it's random so you can be any race, there's no pick or maybe there is!

Enjoy your new adventure!
creator: endege
